name: Onion Pakora (Vengaya Pakora)
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Bengal gram flour (besan, chickpea flour)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, combine 2 teaspoons ghee and baking soda. Rub them together until frothy.
2. Add the remaining ingredients to the mixture and combine well with sufficient water to form a thick batter.
3. Heat oil in a heavy frying pan.
4. Drop spoonfuls of batter into the hot oil.
5. Fry the pakoras until golden brown.
6. When cooked, drain excess oil on a sheet of brown paper or paper towels.
7. Serve hot with chutney.
From: "Dakshin - Vegetarian Cuisine From South India" by Chandra Padmanabhan
